description: ChessNet es una plataforma educativa completa de ajedrez diseñada para colegios, clubes y academias. Permite organizar grupos y calendarios, enseñar con materiales interactivos, evaluar el progreso del alumnado y comunicar de forma sencilla con familias y dirección.

key_features.name: Authentication System
key_features.description: Secure Google OAuth authentication with user profile management

key_features.name: College Management
key_features.description: Create and manage multiple educational centers with complete information

key_features.name: Class Management
key_features.description: Organize classes by levels (beginner, intermediate, advanced) with schedules and settings

key_features.name: Student Management
key_features.description: Manage student profiles, enrollment, and academic progress tracking

key_features.name: Skills Management
key_features.description: Define and organize chess skills by categories and difficulty levels

key_features.name: Attendance Tracking
key_features.description: Track student attendance with status management and detailed analytics

key_features.name: Interactive Chess Board
key_features.description: Fully functional chess board for exercises, lessons, and game analysis

key_features.name: Tournament System
key_features.description: Create and manage local chess tournaments with Swiss and round-robin formats

key_features.name: Analytics Dashboard
key_features.description: Comprehensive analytics and reporting system with student progress tracking

key_features.name: Payment Management
key_features.description: Handle student fees, school payments, and comprehensive financial tracking

key_features.name: Communication System
key_features.description: Announcements and messaging system for families and administration

key_features.name: Gamification Features
key_features.description: Points, levels, badges, and achievement tracking system to motivate students

key_features.name: Subscription Management
key_features.description: Handle user subscriptions, plans, and billing management

backend.api: RESTful API with SvelteKit server routes

chess_engine.board: Custom Svelte component with chessboardjs integration

user_stories.title: User Authentication
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to securely log in with my Google account so that I can access my chess classes and student data.
acceptance_criteria: User can login with Google OAuth
User profile is created automatically
Session is maintained across browser refreshes
User can logout securely

user_stories.title: College Management
user_stories.description: As an administrator, I want to create and manage educational centers so that I can organize my chess programs.
acceptance_criteria: Can create new colleges with complete information
Can edit college details
Can view list of all colleges
Can delete empty colleges

user_stories.title: Class Organization
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to create and manage chess classes so that I can organize students by skill level.
acceptance_criteria: Can create classes with different levels
Can set schedules and descriptions
Can assign maximum student capacity
Can activate/deactivate classes

user_stories.title: Student Enrollment
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to enroll students in classes so that I can track their progress and attendance.
acceptance_criteria: Can add student information including parent contacts
Can assign students to specific classes
Can view student profiles and history
Can search and filter students

user_stories.title: Attendance Tracking
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to mark student attendance so that I can track participation and communicate with parents.
acceptance_criteria: Can mark students as Present, Late, or Absent
Can add notes to attendance records
Can view attendance statistics and trends
Can generate attendance reports

user_stories.title: Chess Instruction
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to use an interactive chess board so that I can demonstrate moves and teach chess concepts effectively.
acceptance_criteria: Chess board displays correctly with all pieces
Can move pieces according to chess rules
Can load different chess positions
Can solve chess exercises interactively

user_stories.title: Progress Analytics
user_stories.description: As a teacher, I want to view student progress analytics so that I can identify areas for improvement and track learning outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows key metrics and statistics
Can view individual student progress
Can compare class performance
Can export progress reports

business_requirements.scalability: Support multiple educational institutions with hundreds of students per institution
business_requirements.performance: Page load times under 3 seconds, responsive interactions under 1 second
business_requirements.security: Row-level security (RLS) with proper user data isolation
business_requirements.compliance: GDPR compliant data handling for European users

success_metrics: 20-40% increase in completed exercises per week
30-50% reduction in administrative time for teachers
Improved learning outcomes through structured skill progression
constraints: Must work on modern web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
Must be responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices
Must integrate with existing Google authentication systems
Must comply with educational data privacy requirements
assumptions: Teachers are familiar with basic web applications
Students have access to devices for interactive exercises
Educational institutions support modern web browsers
